title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One more time from the top!! to the Ninja-pirate- Mink-Samural Alliance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To the retainers, Yakuza, Aand the rest of Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: way to go! You all fought great!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll leave the toasting to you!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Don't tell anybody in Wano about me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: 'Cause I don't wanna be a hero!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright! Here's to all the feasts to come!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is the biggest and wildest...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want nothin' to do with this crap!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't really know what's goin' on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're really going whole-hog on the music and festivities.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we marines aren't in such a good mood...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Especially since the rest of the world is a real mess now....!!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
